name: Spectre
description: Among the Transcendencies, you would be thought ignoble. Mercurial, the Spectre Just as higher states of energy seek a lower level, the Spectre known as Mercurial is a being of intense and violent energy who finds herself irresistibly drawn to scenes of strife as they unfold in the physical world.

abilities.name: Desolate
abilities.description: Grants all created illusions with this ability outgoing damage bonus. Search Radius: 350. Damage: 25 (37). Damage Bonus per Hero Level: 2. Damage Dealt: (15%).

abilities.name: Spectral Dagger
abilities.description: Flings a dagger to draw a Shadow Path, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed of all enemy units along the trail. Grants Spectre unobstructed movement while on the Spectral Path. Cast Range: 1800. Effect Radius: 125. Damage: 70/120/170/220 (150/200/250/300). Move Speed Slow: 10%/14%/18%/22% (25%/29%/33%/37%). Speed Linger Duration: 4. Path Radius: 175. Cooldown: 22/20/18/16. Mana Cost: 110/120/130/140.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: The Shadow Step-illusion refreshes its duration upon reaching the target. The illusion deals a portion of Spectre's damage and receives additional incoming damage. Cast Range: 750/900/1050/1200. Number of Illusions: 1. Set Move Speed: 900. First Illusion Duration: 7/8/9/10 (9/10/11/12). Damage Dealt: 32%/38%/44%/50%. Damage Taken: 200%. Cooldown: 30/26/22/18. Mana Cost: 60/65/70/75.

abilities.name: Dispersion
abilities.description: Increases both the current damage reflected and current damage reduction upon cast. Min Radius: 350. Max Radius: 800. Damage Reflected: 8%/12%/16%/20% (12%/16%/20%/24%). Damage Reduction: 8%/12%/16%/20% (12%/16%/20%/24%). Damage Reflected Factor: (1.5). Damage Reduction Factor: (1.5).

abilities.name: Haunt
abilities.description: The illusion deals a portion of Spectre's damage and receives additional incoming damage. The illusion is uncontrollable, has unobstructed movement Effect Radius: Global. Number of Illusions per Hero: 1. Damage Dealt: 30%/55%/80%. Damage Taken: 200%. Duration: 5/6/7. Cooldown: 180/160/140. Mana Cost: 125/150/175.
